_meta.description: Status code lookup for SpotLog UK staging data
_meta.source: SpotLog (spotlog.org) — inferred from vehicle context and notes

A.notes: Explicitly active/operational. Seen on Class 37 — confirmed by context.

S.notes: Stored/out of use. Standard TOPS-era convention.

X.notes: Withdrawn from service. Not necessarily scrapped.

T.notes: Under trial or conversion. Seen on locos undergoing modification.

E.notes: 52/53 E-status Class 66s are in WGEA pool (DB Cargo France). One Class 47 (47375) also E with no pool/depot. Consistent with exported to continental Europe.

W.notes: 66048 notes: 'Derailed at Carrbridge 04/01/2010 and written-off.' 47811 also W. Distinct from X (Withdrawn) — implies accidental write-off.

~.notes: 66954/5/6 notes: 'In Poland as 66019/24/25'. Other ~ vehicles are active DB Cargo locos. Tilde appears to mean operating abroad under a different number or on hire overseas.

O.notes: Single vehicle: 66732, GBRf GBLT pool, Long Preston depot, no notes. Insufficient data to confirm. 'On Loan' is the most likely meaning given operator context.

(blank).notes: Blank status appears on 379/682 staged vehicles including active Class 66s. May mean 'normal operational status' for that class, but cannot be globally mapped to Active without class-level confirmation. Must remain NULL in status_text.
